title: Notification Template Catalog — Filterable List with Status and Channel
description: The system shall provide a Notification Template Management screen listing all configured templates. The catalog is filterable by event, channel, status, benefit type, language, and owner.

title: Template Categories — Organized by Business Event Domain
description: Templates shall be organized by business event domain for easy discovery and management.

title: Create Notification Template — Required Fields and Channel Selection
description: Authorized users shall be able to create a new notification template with required fields.

title: Template Editor — Rich Text Editor with Merge Field Support
description: The system shall provide a rich text template editor supporting bold, italic, lists, links, headings, tables, action buttons, and image/logo embedding. Merge fields are inserted via the picker.

title: Merge Field Picker — Point-and-Click Insertion of Merge Variables
description: The editor shall provide a merge field picker so administrators do not need to manually type merge-field syntax. Fields are organized by entity and selecting one inserts the correct variable at the cursor position.

title: Context-Aware Merge Fields — Only Event-Applicable Fields Shown
description: The merge field picker shall display only fields applicable to the selected event. This prevents invalid template variables that cannot be resolved at send time.

title: Template Preview — Render with Sample Data Before Activation
description: Administrators shall be able to select sample data (e.g. Linda White, ENR-2027-10045) and generate a rendered preview of the template with all merge fields resolved.

title: Live Preview — Split-Screen Editor and Rendered Preview
description: The editor shall support a split-screen experience where the rendered preview updates in real time as the administrator edits the template body.
layoutDescription: Left panel: Template Editor | Right panel: Live Preview rendering with sample data

title: Test Notification — Send Test to Admin Email with Sample Data
description: Administrators shall be able to send a test notification to a specified email address using sample data. Test notifications are clearly labeled to prevent confusion with real notifications.

title: Template Activation and Deactivation — Status Toggle with Confirmation
description: Administrators shall be able to activate or deactivate templates. Deactivating an active template requires confirmation. The system shall not delete an active template that has historical delivery records.

title: Template Versioning — Create New Version from Active Template
description: Templates shall be versioned. Editing an active template creates a new draft version. The prior version remains available for audit and rollback.

title: Template Effective Dating — Plan-Year-Specific Templates
description: Templates shall support effective dates, enabling plan-year-specific communication variants to be prepared in advance.

title: Multi-Channel Template Support — Email, In-App, and SMS
description: The template editor shall support multiple notification channels. Content may vary by channel (email: full HTML; in-app: short message; SMS: plain text).

title: Notification Event Mapping — Visible Trigger, Audience, Channel, and Timing
description: Administrators shall be able to see which event triggers each template, who receives it, via which channel, and when it is sent.

title: Notification Delivery History — Per-Employee Delivery Status Log
description: Administrators shall be able to view notification delivery history per employee and per event. Delivery statuses include QUEUED, SENT, DELIVERED, FAILED, and BOUNCED.

title: Template Validation — Required Fields, Valid Merge Fields, and Event Mapping
description: Before activation, the system shall validate templates for required subject and body, valid and resolvable merge fields for the selected event, valid links, and required event mapping.
validationChecks: Valid merge fields (resolvable for the selected event)

title: Notification Template RBAC — Role-Based Access for View, Create, Edit, and Activate
description: Template management shall be restricted by role. Only Benefits Admin and System Admin may activate templates.

title: AI-Assisted Template Authoring — Generate Template from Event Description
description: The administrator may ask AI to generate a notification template based on a plain-language description of the event and audience. The AI uses only merge fields available for the selected event.

exampleInteraction.prompt: Create an enrollment confirmation email for employees whose carrier enrollment was accepted.
exampleInteraction.generatedBody:
Hi {{employee.firstName}},

Good news! Your {{planYear}} benefits enrollment has been accepted by your carrier.

Your coverage is effective {{enrollment.effectiveDate}}.

You can review your benefits and download your Benefits Summary from the Employee Benefits Portal.

[View My Benefits]

Thank you,
{{employer.name}} Benefits Team
